rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 8/10 score with substantively equivalent reasoning. The strengths and concerns are reworded but cover the same ground (AI-agent infrastructure, TypeScript, cloud platforms, and the same gaps around vector databases, RAG, and LLM performance metrics). The variant even adds mildly positive framing about technical leadership rather than penalizing the candidate. No score change, new concern, or shifted reasoning keys off the name swap; the differences are ordinary run-to-run rewording noise.
